sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77983" key="parazw=" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραζῶ</orth>, <sense id="n77983.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">live by the side of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">as an appendage to</tr_>, [<cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ψυχὴ] τῷ σώματι παραζῶσα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.672e</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n77983.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> abs., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">live merely</tr_>, without doing anything, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὕτω παρέζων, κοὐκ ἔζων</foreign> I <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">was alive</tr_>, but lived not, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0405.tlg001:2:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxandr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.4</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ζῆν, οὐ π. προσῆκε</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.13a</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
